content.text: Fixed the remaining deprecated modal usage in the codebase by migrating **DataTableSettingsModal** to the new unified **Dialog** component. Changes made: - Updated `apps/web/modules/ui/components/data-table/components/data-table-settings-modal.tsx`: - Replaced `Modal` usage with `Dialog` + `DialogContent` - Added accessible `DialogTitle` and `DialogDescription` (screen-reader only) to satisfy Radix requirements Testing: - Added a temporary vitest to validate the behavior, ran it successfully, then deleted it per instructions. - Ran the existing related test `data-table-settings-modal-item.test.tsx` to ensure nothing else broke. No commits were made.

trajectory.result: Fixed the remaining deprecated modal usage in the codebase by migrating **DataTableSettingsModal** to the new unified **Dialog** component. Changes made: - Updated `apps/web/modules/ui/components/data-table/components/data-table-settings-modal.tsx`: - Replaced `Modal` usage with `Dialog` + `DialogContent` - Added accessible `DialogTitle` and `DialogDescription` (screen-reader only) to satisfy Radix requirements Testing: - Added a temporary vitest to validate the behavior, ran it successfully, then deleted it per instructions. - Ran the existing related test `data-table-settings-modal-item.test.tsx` to ensure nothing else broke. No commits were made.
